versions.label: v0

notes.text: [PRINT] Print-in-place nut-and-bolt — print flat on the open base, NO supports, NO raft. The screw is hidden inside the threaded cone; after printing, grip the cone and twist/push the screw out through the bottom to free it (a firm first turn breaks any thin print bridges), then it screws back in. Thin layers (0.12-0.16 mm) + 100% part cooling keep the threads from bonding. 3-4 walls, 15-20% infill, PLA. If it won't turn, raise Thread clearance; if it's sloppy, lower it. componentCount === 2 (screw + socket).

[WORKFLOW] Drive this app via window.partwright (see /ai.md). Use runAndSave(code, label, assertions) for iterations; after structural changes verify visually via renderViews (use views:"box" for an all-faces final check); addSessionNote with [REQUIREMENT]/[DECISION]/[MEASUREMENT]/[FEEDBACK]/[ATTEMPT]/[TODO] prefixes; getSessionContext() when resuming.
